headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Blackstone (BX) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering if Blackstone at around US$108 a share still offers value, or if most of the easy gains are already behind it. The stock is down about 4.5% over the last week, 4.7% over the past month, 31.8% year to date and 23.6% over the last year. The 3-year and 5-year returns sit at 39.6% and 72.5% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on Blackstone as a bellwether private markets manager, with attention on how fundraising trends and deployment activity are shaping sentiment around...
